documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DATAHUB Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DATAHUB from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-datahub';
```

modules.name: ros_cdk_datahub
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DATAHUB Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DATAHUB from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-datahub';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_datahub.Project

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.Project.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DATAHUB::Project`, which is used to create a DataHub project.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosProject\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-datahub-project>

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.ProjectProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Project`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-datahub-project>

```
param comment

Property comment: The comment of project.

param project_name

Property projectName: The name of the project. Length [3, 32]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.
```

documentation: Property comment: The comment of project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.ProjectProps.project_name
documentation:
Property projectName: The name of the project.

Length [3, 32]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.RosProject.project_name
documentation: :Property: projectName: The name of the project. Length [3, 32]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DATAHUB::Project`, which is used to create a DataHub project.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Project` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-datahub-project>

documentation: :Property: projectName: The name of the project. Length [3, 32]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.RosTopic.record_type
documentation: :Property: recordType: Record type. TUPLE: structured data, BLOB: unstructured data.

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.RosTopic.topic_name
documentation: :Property: topicName: The name of the topic. Length [3, 64]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.RosTopic.record_schema
documentation: :Property: recordSchema: When creating a TUPLE type topic, you need to specify the schema, but the BLOB type does not pass this parameter.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DATAHUB::Topic`, which is used to create a topic.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Topic` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-datahub-topic>

classes.name: ros_cdk_datahub.Topic

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.Topic.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DATAHUB::Topic`, which is used to create a topic.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosTopic\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-datahub-topic>

methods.name: ros_cdk_datahub.TopicProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Topic`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-datahub-topic>

```
param comment

Property comment: The comment of topic.

param project_name

Property projectName: The name of the project. Length [3, 32]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.

param record_type

Property recordType: Record type. TUPLE: structured data, BLOB: unstructured data.

param topic_name

Property topicName: The name of the topic. Length [3, 64]. Beginning with characters, only characters, numbers and _ are allowed.

param lifecycle

Property lifecycle: Data storage life cycle.

param record_schema

Property recordSchema: When creating a TUPLE type topic, you need to specify the schema, but the BLOB type does not pass this parameter.

param shard_count

Property shardCount: Initial shard number.
```
